# Gcore Colocation

> Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer hardware in Tier 3 and Tier 4 data centers across 29 global locations with DDoS protection and on-site support.

- [Colocation](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/overview.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation - place customer hardware in Tier 3 and Tier 4 data centers across 29 global locations with DDoS protection and on-site support.
- [Connectivity services](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/connectivity.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation connectivity services - IP Transit, IP Access, Cross-Connects, and Leased Lines for internet access and private networking at Gcore data center locations.
- [Smart Hands](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/smart-hands.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation Smart Hands - paid on-site technical support service with standard and high-priority tiers for customer hardware.
- [Hardware resale](https://gcore.com/docs/colocation/hardware-resale.md): Overview of Gcore Colocation Hardware Resale - Gcore procures and delivers new or used hardware to colocation data centers on the customer behalf.
